text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "reg.exe is used to establish persistence by adding a non-standard logon script (UserInitMprLogonScript) pointing to a batch file in the user's Temp directory, which is a common malware technique.",
  "indicators": [
    "reg.exe",
    "persistence",
    "HKCU\\Environment",
    "UserInitMprLogonScript",
    "AppData\\Local\\Temp",
    "art.bat"
  ]
}
